description: LLM Integration - Add conversational AI capabilities via Ollama with intelligent response chunking for LoRa mesh constraints

userStories.title: Add database migration for LLM conversation context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database table to store conversation history for context management.
acceptanceCriteria: Table has columns: id, context_key, role, content, timestamp, created_at
Append migration to MIGRATIONS list with ID 42
Migration runs successfully when bot starts
userStories.notes: Used migration ID 13 instead of 42 to maintain sequential ID pattern required by existing tests

userStories.title: Create OllamaClient HTTP wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a client to communicate with Ollama API.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement async generate(prompt, context, system_prompt) method
Handle connection errors, timeouts, and malformed responses gracefully
Use aiohttp for async HTTP requests
userStories.notes: Implemented OllamaClient with async HTTP methods, comprehensive error handling, Google-style docstrings. Added close() method for session cleanup.

userStories.title: Implement LLMContextManager for conversation history
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to manage conversation context stored in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement async get_context(context_key, max_exchanges) - retrieve recent history
Implement async add_message(context_key, role, content) - save new message
Implement async prune_context(context_key, max_exchanges, ttl_seconds) - cleanup old entries
Implement async clear_context(context_key) - delete all for key
Implement format_context_for_ollama(context) - convert DB records to Ollama format
userStories.notes: Implemented LLMContextManager with all required methods. Uses AsyncDBManager for async DB operations. Includes comprehensive Google-style docstrings and proper error handling.

userStories.title: Add response chunking utility function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to split long LLM responses into LoRa-compatible chunks.
acceptanceCriteria: Split at sentence boundaries (. ! ?) when possible
Fallback to word boundaries if sentences too long
Truncate with suffix '...(truncated)' if exceeds max_parts
userStories.notes: Implemented chunk_llm_response() with sentence/word boundary splitting, chunk indicators, and truncation support. All quality checks pass.

userStories.title: Create LLM configuration section
userStories.description: As a user, I need to configure LLM settings in config.ini.
acceptanceCriteria: Include all settings: enabled, ollama_endpoint, ollama_model, ollama_timeout_seconds
Include chunking settings: max_chunk_length, max_response_parts, chunk_delay_seconds
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive [LLM_Command] configuration section with all required settings, detailed comments, and LoRa-optimized defaults. Follows existing config patterns (command stub format, comment style).

userStories.title: Implement LLMCommand basic structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the LLMCommand plugin skeleton with configuration loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Load all config values from [LLM_Command] section in __init__
userStories.notes: Implemented LLMCommand class skeleton with all config loading, can_execute(), get_help_text(). Placeholder execute() method for future stories. All quality checks pass.

userStories.title: Implement LLMCommand execute method with context
userStories.description: As a user, I want to ask the bot questions via !ask command.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract question from message.content (strip command keyword)
Build context_key from message (channel name or user pubkey/ID)
Query Ollama using OllamaClient with context and system prompt
Handle Ollama errors gracefully with user-friendly messages
Save user question and bot response to context
Return True on success, False on failure
userStories.notes: Implemented full execute() method with context loading, Ollama querying, error handling, and message saving. Helper methods _extract_question() and _build_context_key() added.

userStories.title: Implement LLM response chunking and delivery
userStories.description: As a user, I want long LLM responses split into multiple messages that fit LoRa constraints.
acceptanceCriteria: In LLMCommand.execute(), chunk the Ollama response using chunk_llm_response()
If single chunk, send via send_response()
If multiple chunks, send via send_response_chunked() with configured delay
Truncation happens if response would create >max_response_parts chunks
User sees chunk indicators [1/N] for multi-part responses
userStories.notes: Implemented response chunking with chunk_llm_response. Single chunks sent via send_response, multi-chunk via send_response_chunked which has built-in rate limiting delays.

userStories.title: Add context pruning after each LLM response
userStories.description: As a developer, I need old context automatically removed to prevent unbounded DB growth.
acceptanceCriteria: In LLMCommand.execute(), after saving response call prune_context()
Pass context_max_exchanges and context_ttl_seconds from config
Pruning removes entries older than TTL
Pruning keeps only max_exchanges most recent pairs
Pruning errors are logged but don't fail the command
userStories.notes: Implemented context pruning after LLM response with error logging. Pruning errors don't fail command execution.

userStories.title: Implement clear-context command
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear my conversation history.
acceptanceCriteria: In execute(), detect if message is clear-context request
userStories.notes: Implemented clear-context detection and handling in execute() method with dedicated helper method _is_clear_context_request(). All quality checks pass.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for OllamaClient
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the Ollama HTTP client.
acceptanceCriteria: Test successful generate() with mocked aiohttp response
Use pytest fixtures for mock responses
userStories.notes: Created comprehensive test suite with 25 tests covering all OllamaClient methods. Achieved 93% coverage. Used patch.object() to mock _get_session() for proper aiohttp session mocking.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for LLMContextManager
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for context CRUD operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Test get_context() with empty and populated history
Test add_message() creates correct DB entry
Test prune_context() removes old entries based on TTL
Test clear_context() deletes all entries for key
Use tmp_path fixture for test database
userStories.notes: Created comprehensive test suite with 30 tests organized into 7 test classes. Achieved 100% coverage (55/55 statements). All quality checks pass.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for response chunking
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the chunking utility.
acceptanceCriteria: Test short response (single chunk, no indicators)
Test long response split at sentence boundaries
Test response with no sentence boundaries (word split)
Test edge cases: empty string, very long words

userStories.title: Add integration test for LLMCommand end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an integration test with mocked Ollama.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Ollama error handling returns user-friendly message

userStories.title: Add LLM commands to documentation
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation for the new LLM features.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/llm-integration.md with installation, configuration, usage sections
Include Ollama setup instructions (install, pull model, serve)
Add FAQ section with common issues
Update README.md to mention LLM integration in features list
